Continuity lock: B004|child|palace_entry | Narrative cue: 毫不犹豫将你送进宫里的净身厂子。

shots.visual_prompt: High-quality 2D vector cartoon, a stick-figure character with a round bean head sitting majestically on an ornate carved mahogany chair in a Qing dynasty mansion. The character wears a dark silk robe, holding a glowing golden official seal. Background features intricate wood carvings and a lantern-lit hall. Style: bold black outlines, vibrant flat colors with soft cel-shading, Cyanide and Happiness aesthetic with professional lighting. Continuity lock: B039|middle|ascension | Narrative cue: 这份极致的死忠，让你稳稳坐上总管宝座。

shots.beat_text: 光绪三十四年，你迎来人生的权力巅峰。

shots.beat_text: 你名下暗股控制的京城当铺已有十二家。
